case_title: THE STEWART COMPANY VS. QUINTON GOODAN et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO VACATE OCT 20, 2010 JUDGMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PER STIPULATIONQ, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STEWART COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOODAN, QUINTON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 303 B NIMITZ DR., YERBA BUENA ISLAND, S.F.
